name: oltp_type1_point_lookup
query: MATCH (n:%node_type_1% {name: '%node_type_1_name_1%'}) RETURN n.age AS age, n.score AS score, n.active AS active

name: oltp_type1_neighbors
query: MATCH (a:%node_type_1% {name: '%node_type_1_name_1%'})-[:%edge_type_1%]->(b:%node_type_1%) RETURN b.name AS neighbor ORDER BY neighbor LIMIT 25

name: oltp_cross_type_lookup
query: MATCH (a:%node_type_1% {name: '%node_type_1_name_2%'})-[:%edge_type_2%]->(b:%node_type_2%) RETURN b.name AS target_name, b.score AS target_score ORDER BY target_score DESC LIMIT 25

name: oltp_update_type1_score
query: MATCH (n:%node_type_1% {name: '%node_type_1_name_3%'}) SET n.score = 88.5, n.active = false

name: oltp_create_type1_node
query: CREATE (n:%node_type_1% {name: '%created_type_1_name%', age: 44, score: 99.5, active: true})

name: oltp_create_cross_type_edge
query: MATCH (a:%node_type_1% {name: '%node_type_1_name_1%'}), (b:%node_type_2% {name: '%node_type_2_name_1%'}) CREATE (a)-[:%edge_type_2% {note: 'bench-note', weight: 1.5, score: 2.0, active: true, rank: 7}]->(b)

name: oltp_delete_type1_edge
query: MATCH (a:%node_type_1% {name: '%node_type_1_name_1%'})-[r:%edge_type_1%]->(b:%node_type_1%) DELETE r

name: oltp_delete_type1_node
query: MATCH (n:%node_type_1% {name: '%node_type_1_name_4%'}) DETACH DELETE n

name: oltp_program_create_and_link
query: MATCH (a:%node_type_1% {name: '%node_type_1_name_1%'}) CREATE (a)-[:%edge_type_1% {note: 'program-link', weight: 2.0, score: 3.0, active: true, rank: 11}]->(:%node_type_1% {name: '%created_type_1_peer_name%', age: 28, score: 4.5, active: true})

name: oltp_update_cross_type_edge_rank
query: MATCH (a:%node_type_1% {name: '%node_type_1_name_2%'})-[r:%edge_type_2%]->(b:%node_type_2%) SET r.rank = 77, r.active = false

name: olap_type1_active_leaderboard
query: MATCH (n:%node_type_1%) WHERE n.active = true RETURN n.name AS name, n.score AS score ORDER BY score DESC, name ASC LIMIT 50

name: olap_type1_age_rollup
query: MATCH (n:%node_type_1%) RETURN n.active AS active, count(*) AS total, avg(n.score) AS avg_score, max(n.age) AS max_age ORDER BY active

name: olap_cross_type_edge_rollup
query: MATCH (a:%node_type_1%)-[r:%edge_type_2%]->(b:%node_type_2%) RETURN b.active AS target_active, count(*) AS total, avg(r.score) AS avg_edge_score ORDER BY target_active

name: olap_variable_length_reachability
query: MATCH (a:%node_type_1% {name: '%node_type_1_name_1%'})-[:%edge_type_1%*1..%variable_hop_max%]->(b:%node_type_1%) RETURN b.name AS friend, b.score AS score ORDER BY score DESC, friend LIMIT 50

name: olap_three_type_path_count
query: MATCH (a:%node_type_1%)-[:%edge_type_2%]->(b:%node_type_2%)-[:%edge_type_3%]->(c:%node_type_3%) RETURN count(*) AS path_count

name: olap_type2_score_distribution
query: MATCH (n:%node_type_2%) RETURN n.active AS active, count(*) AS total, min(n.score) AS min_score, max(n.score) AS max_score ORDER BY total DESC, active

name: olap_fixed_length_path_projection
query: MATCH (a:%node_type_1%)-[:%edge_type_2%]->(b:%node_type_2%)-[:%edge_type_3%]->(c:%node_type_3%) RETURN a.name AS source_name, b.name AS middle_name, c.name AS sink_name ORDER BY source_name, middle_name, sink_name LIMIT 50

name: olap_graph_introspection_rollup
query: MATCH (a:%node_type_1%)-[r:%edge_type_2%]->(b:%node_type_2%) RETURN a.id AS source_id, type(r) AS rel_type, startNode(r).id AS start_id, endNode(r).id AS end_id ORDER BY source_id, end_id LIMIT 50

name: olap_with_scalar_rebinding
query: MATCH (n:%node_type_1%) WITH n.name AS name, n.score AS score, n.active AS active RETURN active, count(*) AS total, avg(score) AS avg_score, min(name) AS first_name ORDER BY total DESC, active

name: olap_variable_length_grouped_rollup
query: MATCH (a:%node_type_1%)-[:%edge_type_1%*0..%grouped_rollup_variable_hop_max%]->(b:%node_type_1%) RETURN b.active AS active, count(b) AS total, avg(b.score) AS avg_score ORDER BY total DESC, active
